summary: Frontend-only regression validation completed for PDF save/download paths in Doctor Sharing and Public Report, plus copy-link behavior.
action_items: No blocking issues found in the requested scope; keep monitoring PDF save behavior on iOS Safari and Android Chrome real devices due API capability differences.
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/src/meditrack-app.jsx is 1788 lines (>700 guideline); split into focused modules/pages to reduce regression risk in sharing/PDF code paths.
seed_data_creation: No new seeded account. Used provided patient test user; reused existing shared report.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Validated with Playwright on public URL. Doctor sharing download button emitted a real browser download event, copy-link toast fired, and public report download button also emitted download event.
rca of the issue: Original failure (from prior context) was likely due browser capability/path mismatch for file save. Current implementation correctly cascades from showSaveFilePicker -> native share/save -> browser blob download fallback, and download events are now observed in automated browser validation.
